title: AXPoiMarker
description: Represents a Point of Interest marker on the map with the same properties as AXMapMarker plus additional POI-specific properties.

props.name: latitude
props.description: The latitude coordinate of the POI marker.

props.name: longitude
props.description: The longitude coordinate of the POI marker.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title for the POI marker.

props.name: popupOpen
props.description: Whether the popup should be open by default.

props.name: popupCloseButton
props.description: Whether the popup should have a close button.

props.name: minZoom
props.description: Minimum zoom level at which this POI marker becomes visible.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: TypeScript interface definition for POI markers.
